generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you see how the EU's strategic autonomy push is making us vulnerable? When they cut defense ties with us last year, response times to cyber threats in allied networks spiked 40%. Our duty is clear: we can't afford to outsource security to bureaucrats who don't share our values. #NationalSecurityFirst
